title: ClimateDataInterchangeFormat
description: Carbon DPI Protocol — Layer 2. The CDIF (Climate Data Interchange Format) defines the 8 mandatory fields for any climate data submission. Every data point entering the Carbon DPI protocol must conform to this schema.

id.description: Unique identifier for this data point

cih_reference.description: CIH from Layer 1 — links this data to a verified identity-asset binding

source_type.description: Data source type — determines trust level assignment

source_id.description: Device or system identifier that produced this data

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of measurement. Cannot be in the future.

geolocation.description: GPS coordinates of the asset at time of measurement

device_signature.description: Cryptographic signature from the device proving data authenticity. 'MANUAL' for non-IoT sources.

reporting_period.description: Monitoring window for this data point

schema_version.description: CDIF version identifier for backward compatibility

trust_score.description: Computed trust level. IOT_SENSOR/SATELLITE=HIGH, SCADA/API=MEDIUM, MANUAL/SCAN=LOW
